reviews.review_title: I found a game bug/weird issue
reviews.review_description: so when my friends joined the code i sent them and i was in. i couldnt see them but i can hear them which im so confused on why. but it might be a weird issue you could fix. i still like it no matter what how many bugs there is. i still dont know why i couldnt see them in the code but only hears their voice out of no where.

developer_response.body: We have fixed it due to our new patch 2.2 update with better RPCs which also fix public servers and are now less laggy.
